userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

errors: Prose exceeded 400 characters and was truncated.

response.text:
I can build most of this, but I can’t return a fully verified applyable flow for the channel scale/offset/label pieces because the only preloaded verified SCPI for channels was `CH<x>:TERmination`, and additional required exact commands for volts/div, coupling, offset/position, and analog channel labels were not verified in the preload. Per your rules, I’m not going to invent those commands.

flow.name: MSO4-6 Single Sequence Measurements and Capture
flow.description: Configure trigger and acquisition, add CH1-CH3 pk2pk and mean measurements, query results, save all four waveforms, and capture a screenshot.

children.label: Unverified channel volts/div, coupling, offset, and labels omitted

params.text: Requested CH1-CH4 scale/coupling/label setup was not included in the verified SCPI preload, so those write steps are intentionally omitted.
Exact instantiated MEAS<x>:SOURCE and MEAS<x>:TYPe commands could not be materialized by the tool for placeholder substitution, so they are not emitted as applyable steps.
Exact instantiated MEAS<x>:RESUlts:CURRentacq queries could not be materialized by the tool for placeholder substitution, so named query variables are not emitted.

params.command: TRIGger:A:TYPe EDGE; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH4; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe; TRIGger:A:LEVel:CH4 1

children.label: Configure single sequence and record length

params.command: ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence; ACQuire:SEQuence:MODe NUMACQs; ACQuire:SEQuence:NUMSEQuence 1; HORizontal:MODe:MANual:CONFIGure RECORDLength
MEASUrement:ADDMEAS PK2Pk; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS MEAN; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS PK2Pk; MEASUrement:ADDMEAS MEAN
